title: Midnight Cumbia Systems
summary: Cumbia digital, live brass and a late-night patio set built for Guadalajara weekends.
description: Midnight Cumbia Systems toma Foro GDL con Sonora Dinamita para una noche de energía alta, entrada ágil y ambiente pensado para móvil, social y conversión inmediata.
venueAddress: Av. Chapultepec Sur 180, Americana, Guadalajara, Jalisco

narrative.manifesto: Una pieza editorial mas elegante para presentar música en vivo / cumbia con tension entre fotografia, tipografia y atmosfera nocturna.

handoff.summary: Completed poster direction for Foro GDL using the velvet-program template and brass-marquee-site renderer with a Jazz Poster shell ready for programmatic rendering.
developerNotes: Render the Jazz Poster system as the fixed page shell, not as ad-hoc per-component styling.
Keep the poster hierarchy focused on genre and preserve the title stack exactly as delivered by the designer.
Use Notas flotantes, Recortes organicos, Lineas de onda only as supporting layers so the CTA, schedule, and venue facts stay readable.

assetPlan.query: Midnight Cumbia Systems Música en vivo Cumbia Ambiente Latino Sesión híbrida live portrait
assetPlan.notes: Use the uploaded hero as the base cutout, then recolor, crop, and silhouette-treat it for the selected renderer.
Decorative ornaments should come from the local poster graphics pack so the page keeps contrast and deploys deterministically.

handoff.summary: Ticket design for Midnight Cumbia Systems using glass-banner aligned to the velvet-program poster system.
developerNotes: Keep the ticket visually tied to the event poster but optimized for scanning and compact information density.
Prioritize title, date, venue, price, purchase reference, and a clear QR zone.
Do not let the decorative background reduce legibility of the operational details.

title: Neo Jazz Azotea Session QA
summary: A rooftop jazz night with modern harmony, analog synth textures, and fast QR check-in.
description: Designed as a premium but lightweight public event page, this session showcases how venues can publish indexed event landing pages without heavy scripts.
venueAddress: Av. Chapultepec Sur 180, Americana, Guadalajara, Jalisco
